_usage: Copy this file, rename it, and adjust parameters
_notes: population_spec supports mixed payoff cohorts — each cohort can have
a different payoff (BinaryMG, ScaledMG, DollarGame) and score_lambda.
Payoff type is never changed by evolution — only strategies are replaced.
Price and market history persist continuously across generations.
poverty_percentile and replacement_rate together control evolutionary speed:
- high percentile + high rate: aggressive, fast evolution
- low percentile + low rate: gradual, realistic market turnover
reset_wealth=true mimics bankruptcy; false mimics strategy replacement only.
